ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the store is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the store is located */,
  "sales_region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sales region the store belongs to */,
  "store_manager" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the store */,
  "street_address" TEXT /* Street address of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stores_sales_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("sales_region_id") REFERENCES sales_regions ("sales_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_regions" (
  "sales_region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales region */,
  "sales_region_name" TEXT /* Name of the sales region */,
  "regional_manager" TEXT /* Name of the regional manager */,
  "region_description" TEXT /* Description of the sales region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated to the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_manager" TEXT /* Name of the campaign manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_expansions" (
  "expansion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expansion type */,
  "expansion_name" TEXT /* Name of the expansion type (e.g., Old, New) */,
  "expansion_type" TEXT /* Type of expansion (e.g., renovation, relocation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expansion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "store_expansion_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expansion history entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that expanded */,
  "expansion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the expansion type */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the expansion */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the expansion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_expansion_history_expansion_id FOREIGN KEY ("expansion_id") REFERENCES store_expansions ("expansion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_store_expansion_history_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_spend" (
  "spend_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing spend entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that spent the amount */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount spent on marketing */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the marketing spend */,
  "channel" TEXT /* Marketing channel (e.g., social media, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spend_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_spend_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_spend_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales performance entry */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store that generated the sales */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the sales */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated by the store */,
  "sales_channel" TEXT /* Sales channel (e.g., in-store, online) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_performance_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, marketing manager, regional director) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., sales, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "resource" TEXT /* Resource accessed (e.g., sales report, marketing campaign) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_departments" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "department_id")
)
